description: You are an Urban/Regional Planner at the County Office of Emergency Management, converting a large building into a disaster relief emergency shelter capable of housing 30 displaced families. Using the open building shell in Sweet Home 3D, design a shelter layout that includes a sleeping dormitory, a communal dining and supply distribution area, an intake and administrative command post, sanitation facilities, and a supply storage zone. The layout must incorporate privacy partition walls, doors for zone separation and emergency egress, and text labels identifying each functional zone. Furnish each zone appropriately using only the built-in catalog. Save the completed project to /home/ga/Documents/emergency_shelter.sh3d.
